differential_diagnoses: Occult solid tumor (e.g., pancreatic or pulmonary adenocarcinoma)
Disseminated intravascular coagulation (secondary to malignancy or pancreatitis)
next_steps: Perform bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with cytogenetics and flow cytometry
Obtain ADAMTS13 activity level to rule out thrombotic thrombocytopenic purpura
Monitor soluble IL-2 receptor and ferritin to evaluate for HLH criteria
Perform comprehensive staging imaging (CT chest/abdomen/pelvis or PET/CT) to identify primary malignancy
Manage acute pancreatitis with supportive care and serial lipase monitoring
Initiate goals-of-care discussions in the context of progressive symptoms and potential malignancy
